headings.usage: Bold, expressive headers. Never center by default.

data_numbers.usage: Monospaced for tables, metrics, and KPI cards. Crucial for data alignment.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-[#1F1F22] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0B] border border-[#E2E2E6] hover:bg-[#F7F7F8] hover:text-[#0A0A0B] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-[#616165] hover:text-[#0A0A0B] hover:bg-[#F7F7F8] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all

inputs.default: border border-[#E2E2E6] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black/10 focus:border-black transition-all bg-white text-[#0A0A0B] placeholder:text-[#A0A0A5]

tables.header: bg-[#F7F7F8] border-b border-[#E2E2E6] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-[#616165] font-semibold text-left

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium border

images.description: Minimalist abstract logo for the Ad Agency
Clean office desk environment for the login split screen
Super admin user avatar for sidebar profile

main_agent: IMPLEMENTATION ARCHITECTURE: Use Vite + React + Tailwind + Shadcn. This is an enterprise B2B SaaS dashboard. Ensure layout is 100vh overflow-hidden on the main container with independent scrolling in the sidebar and content area.
TYPOGRAPHY: Import Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi, and IBM Plex Mono. Apply them globally. Data numbers (ROAS, Spend, CTR) MUST use IBM Plex Mono for alignment.

LAYOUT: Implement a fixed left sidebar (`w-64`) with a `#F7F7F8` background. The main content area should have a `#FFFFFF` background. Include a sticky header in the main area with glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80`).
WORKSPACE SWITCHER: Top of the sidebar must have a Multi-brand workspace switcher using Shadcn Select/DropdownMenu displaying the active client's name, avatar, and an active state icon.

DATA GRID: Use 'Control Room Grid' for analytics. Cards must have `border-[#E2E2E6]` and subtle shadows. KPI metric cards (Spend, CTR, CPC, Conversions, ROAS, Impressions) must have a unified height and structured data hierarchy (Label -> Value -> Delta badge).

AI AUDIT PANEL: Render Claude recommendations as specialized cards. Add a subtle 1px animated border gradient or use a pale info background (`#E6F4FE`) with a Phosphor `Sparkle` icon to denote AI insights.
CAMPAIGN TABLE: Implement the unified campaign list using Shadcn Table. Include Platform tags (Meta Ads, Google Ads) using custom colored Badges. Add a 'Status' column (Active/Paused).
CAMPAIGN DETAIL: Provide pause/enable/edit actions using Shadcn DropdownMenu or specialized icon buttons. Never use raw HTML inputs.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` to all critical interaction points (e.g., `data-testid="workspace-switcher"`, `data-testid="metric-card-roas"`, `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
AUTH PAGE: Build a split-screen login page using the `login_background` media URL on one half, and the emergent Google login + email/password form on the other.
